feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Challenge in Assigning admin role to business user in Public Cloud S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing challenge in assigning the admin role to business user in S/4HANA public cloud practical test in learning journey of (SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition). I am selecting mange business user tile but nothing is happening. could any one he

entry.title: Extension fields for workforce replication into S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Currently integrating Workforce master data into S/4HANA Public Cloud using SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) and SOAP APIs, and we need to use custom fields in our process. 

Therefore we have two queries: 

  1. Inbound (CPI → S/4): It seems custom fields are not available in this setup via SOAP APIs. Is there a way to enable or work around this?
  2. Outbound (S/4 → CPI): When you add custom fields to Workforce, events can’t be triggered or don’t include the custom fields in the payload. How can you send these fields to CPI — via events, CDS views, or another method?

Any guidance on how to implement custom fields in this scenario would be appreciated!

Best Regards. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Retention Amount in Sales Order Showing with VAT in Manage Customer Line item– Require Exclusion VAT
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are using Payment Terms as a workaround to manage Retention Amounts in Sales Orders within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, we have observed a discrepancy in how the retention is displayed in the Manage Customer Line-Item app.

In the Manage Customer Line-Item app

  • The retention amount appears in a separate line, which is expected.

  • However, both the main amount and the retention amount include VAT, which results in a total VAT value that is not aligned with our requirement.

Business Requirement:

  • Retention amount should be displayed without VAT.
  • VAT should only be applied to the net payable amount, excluding the retention until it's due.

Request:

 

We would like to know:

  1. Is there a standard configuration or best practice in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to exclude VAT from the retention line?
  2. Can retention amount be excluded from VAT calculation or shown separately in reporting?

 

Regards,

Vishal

entry.title: What are the BADI's available for Payment Medium Format in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Can you let me know what BADIs are available for Payment Medium Format and their function

entry.title: Upload payroll file into MultiBank Connectivity Monitor
entry.content:
Our client needs to integrate a payroll payment file from an external system into SAP Multibank Connectivity system. Is this possible with MBC's current licensing?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Production Order Confirmation Locking
entry.content:
Dear All

We are using below logic to create production order confirmations for each order in a loop. How to resolve this locking issue, as most probably locking is happening due to auto goods movement after confirmation. Please suggest possible solution as adding WAIT UP TO 2 SECONDS impacting the performance of loop having 100s of production order.


LOOP

 

MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_productionordconfirmationtp PRIVILEGED

ENTITY productionorderconfirmation

CREATE FROM lt_confirmation2

CREATE BY \_prodnordconfmatldocitm FROM lt_matldocitm2

MAPPED DATA(lt_mapped2)

FAILED DATA(lt_failed2)

REPORTED DATA(lt_reported2).
COMMIT ENTITIES.

ENDLOOP

entry.title: Real question still unanswered (how the actual cost will be split as its calculation is next step)?
APIs Billing Document can create the Withholding tax information?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I used the APls Billing Document -Create from third party to create billing document on SAP.

And the third party has the withholding tax information.

Can I use the APIs Billing document to input the Withholding information?

Please suggest.

Best regards,

Chanaporn S.

entry.title: filed" scrap "in routing masterdata（PP）
entry.content:
Regarding the "SCRAP (%)" item in the Routing master,

the item does not exist in the Import template, so how should I migrate the data?

There is no way to update the data after migration, so could you please tell me a good way to do this?

entry.title: About About purchasing and production
entry.content: As shown in the figure, Company A wants to purchase from a supplier and ship directly to the processing destination. Which scope is applicable in the public cloud version, and how does it make a purchase order?

entry.title: About purchasing and production
entry.content:
As shown in the figure,

The purchase requisition in ① is not created manually, but based on MRP.If want to ship directly to the processing destination with that purchase requisition document, how should I set it up and operate it?⇒Please also introduce the purchasing information data.

entry.title: Missing index file at DART/GDPDU extract
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I have introduced the 5XU Scope item for document reporting and compliance at our customer in the public cloud and can therefore also make the Dart extract in the app run statutory reports. we have now handed this over to the customer and he has given it to the auditor to check whether it can be accepted. Here the comment came up that the index file is missing, which the auditor still needs in any case.

Is there a way to activate this by default in the public cloud so that it is also spit out during generation?

Many thanks and best regards,
Vanessa

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Data source extension for outgoing checks
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Are there available data source extension for outgoing checks triggered from the Manage Automatic Payments app and generated in the Manage Outgoing Checks app. 

I am using SAP S/4Hana Public Cloud edition system. 

Thank You 

Regards, 

Melle

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility 

#SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Setup: Only send payment advice via mail if supplier was paid more than 4 invoices
entry.content:
How to configurate sending payment advices via email only after the supplier was paid more then 4 invoices. If equal to 4 or less, no sending of the payment advice is required.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Graphical representation of business partner relationships
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I would like to have the relationships between my business partners displayed graphically.

So far, however, I have only found the option in BP of displaying them as a hierarchy or as a list (see screenshot).

Is it also possible to display these relationships as a tree structure in the Public Cloud?

Can you help me here?

Best regards

Sebastian

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Zero value journal entries during mass asset retirement via FixedAssetRet
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing an unexpected behavior in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud when using the FixedAssetRetirement API to perform mass retirements of fixed assets (retirements without revenue).

When the process runs, some of the journal entries are posted with zero value, even though the related assets still have a net book value (i.e., they are not fully depreciated). This behavior seems inconsistent with accounting expectations and may result in misleading financial reporting.

Here are some additional details:

System: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (latest release)

API used: API_FIXED_ASSET_RETIREMENT_SRV

I would really appreciate your help on the following:

Is this a standard behavior of the FixedAssetRetirement API in the Public Cloud environment?

Is there any SAP Note or configuration setting that could prevent journal entries with 0 value?

Has anyone else experienced this? Any solutions or known workarounds?

Thanks a lot in advance for your support

entry.title: Inquiry on Allocation of Incidental Costs for Imported Raw Materials
entry.content:
We would like to allocate incidental costs such as customs clearance fees, unloading charges, warehousing fees, etc., which occur during the purchase of imported raw materials, to the respective purchased raw materials.

Could you please provide guidance on

1. Which CBC (Central Business Configuration) scope items need to be selected and configured, and

2. In which applications (apps) this process is executed?

entry.title: Down Payment Settlement Line Items Repeating in Final Billing
entry.content:
In the final billing (SD Billing), after the down payment is received and cleared and the delivery is completed, the system generates down payment settlement lines for each sales order line item.

For example: For a sales order with 100 line items, 100 corresponding down payment settlement lines are generated in the billing document. This causes clutter in the invoice output and affects readability.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Adding Pricing Conditions to an Existing Purchasing Info Record
entry.content:
Hi,

i need to add Pricing Conditions to an Existing Purchasing Info Record.

i try with API POST /A_PurgInfoRecdOrgPlantData(PurchasingInfoRecord="{PurchasingInfoRecord}",PurchasingInfoRecordCategory="{PurchasingInfoRecordCategory}",PurchasingOrganization="{PurchasingOrganization}",Plant="{Plant}")/to_PurInfoRecdPrcgCndnValidity

but it doesn"t work. I receive message "Operation "POST" not supported for entity type "A_PurInfoRecdPrcgCndnValidity"" but at this link https://api.sap.com/api/API_INFORECORD_PROCESS_SRV/path/post_A_PurgInfoRecdOrgPlantData_PurchasingInfoRecord___PurchasingInfoRecord___PurchasingInfoRecordCategory___PurchasingInfoRecordCategory___PurchasingOrganization___PurchasingOrganization___Plant___Plant____to_PurInfoRecdPrcgCndnValidity

there is a documentation about this.

 

i tryed this POST https://my401950.s4hana.cloud.sap:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_INFORECORD_PROCESS_SRV/A_PurgInfoRecdOrgPlantData(PurchasingInfoRecord="5300000070",PurchasingInfoRecordCategory="0",PurchasingOrganization="2310",Plant="2310")/to_PurInfoRecdPrcgCndnValidity 

with this body

{    "ConditionRecord": "0000007208",    "ConditionValidityEndDate": "/Date(1492041600000)/",    "ConditionValidityStartDate": "/Date(1492041600000)/",    "ConditionApplication": "M",    "ConditionType": "PPR0",    "PurchasingOrganization": "2310",    "PurchasingInfoRecordCategory": "0",    "PurchasingInfoRecord": "5300000070",    "Supplier": "1000000",    "Material": "ZTEC_ACQ1",    "Plant": "2310"}

but i doesnt" work.

 

Can you help me?

Riccardo

entry.title: Can KPRO in S/4 Public Cloud be configured for HTTPS ArchiveLink?
entry.content: can this be configured in CBC for Public Cloud to use Archivelink content servers?
